title: Blueprint Launchpad
concept: A Blueprint-first Playground redesign where search, category filters, featured Blueprint cards, Blueprint URL entry, and current blueprint.json actions form the home surface, while saved management and Site Manager tools sit in compact workspace bands.
focus: restrained color blocks with clear operational states
flows: Search and filter the full Blueprint gallery, select a featured Blueprint, inspect runtime details, then run, copy, download, or open blueprint.json.
Run a Blueprint from URL or use the current blueprint.json editor with copy link, download bundle, and run actions.
Start from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import from the command source strip and starts panel.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress, then manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions.
Use Site Manager workspace panels for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, and download as zip while retaining the active WordPress preview.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
edit WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
